reason: Successfully located and tested the agent "QA-20260407-210418-7jqj", sent a message "Hello! What is 2+2?", and verified the agent responded correctly with "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent application with sidebar containing three agents.
Found the agent "QA-20260407-210418-7jqj" in the sidebar with status "idle" - Agent was visible in the agent list on the left sidebar.
Clicked on the agent "QA-20260407-210418-7jqj" - Agent page loaded showing the landing page with message "Start a conversation with QA-20260407-210418-7jqj" and confirmed status remained "idle".
Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the message input field - Message was successfully entered into the textbox with data-testid='landing-message-input'.
Clicked the Send message button - Message was sent successfully and the agent status changed to "working" with a session "Basic Math Question Session" created in the sidebar.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response - The agent processed the request for 3 seconds and returned a response.

Verified the response mentions "4" and took a screenshot - The agent correctly responded with "4" to the question "What is 2+2?". Status returned to "idle" and the response is clearly visible in the chat interface showing the correct mathematical answer.
